Through these candid exchanges, bonds deepen, leaving everyone eager for the next stop on their journey.

programme.title: Journey To Dream

programme.title: Chingay 2026 - Wish
programme.desc: Little Star, the main character, lands on Chingay 2026 centre stage. Unsure of her own wish, she embarks on a journey of self discovery. Guided by Yuan Bao, Nenek, Diya, and Reindeer, she learns the true meaning of courage, family, light, and love. Inspired by the unity and passion around her, she discovers her wish — to become a shooting star that shines for a brighter, multicultural Singapore.

programme.title: (Live) Singapore Today
programme.desc: Daily updates on local news headlines and stories.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 365
programme.desc: Yueli stages a trap for Tuohai, but Jingrou livestreams the setup and ruins the plan, stopping Yueli from taking him.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 366
programme.desc: Tuohai is touched by Jingrou’s care and hugs her, while Qianna defies Dali and becomes a hostess.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 367

programme.desc: In the age of AI, could blue-collar trades gain new opportunities? How are young electricians and plumbers building careers? Can MOM’s pilot scheme with clearer pathways and apprenticeships draw more youth? Over four years, Lee Kong Chian Natural History Museum team travelled to 8 countries and 15 museums to digitise 6,000 specimens, bringing 200-year-old Singapore’s ecology back home.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 1
programme.desc: Interpol officer Xu Guo Ying resigns after she failed to protect a suspect. Following advice from her superior, she continues witness-hunting for international cases. Korean idol Kwon Seung-hyun is suspected for murder of Park Kyo-eun. Korean police searches for a Singaporean girl, Hannah, who was with the victim that night. While looking for Hannah, Guo Ying meets Yu Xuan and Zhi Ming.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 2
programme.desc: Hannah, who was kidnapped, manages to escape. She then changes her statement to say that Kwon Seung-hyun had killed Park Kyo-eun, and agrees to testify in Korea. Guo Ying senses something is amiss. She later finds out that Hannah's sister was taken hostage, and she had been forced to give a false testimony. Guo Ying, Yu Xuan and Zhi Ming set off to rescue Hannah's sister but is surrounded...

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 7
programme.desc: Mei Hao Yuan holds its first meeting about the En Bloc project. The supporting and opposing residents have an argument. Yan Xun announces that Mei Hao Yuan will be part of the project and he has become the chairman of the committee. Most of the residents do not oppose. Shu Juan does not want to wait for things to happen. She decides to form an opposition team to protest against the proposition team.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 8
programme.desc: On the deadline for the submission of the En Bloc proposal, Wei Ren's computer breaks down unexpectedly. Wei Ren bumps into Ting Xuan when he is on his way to fix the computer. Ting Xuan recommends him an expert to fix it and he manages to submit the proposal in time. Wei Ren notices Ting Xuan's strengths. He changes his impression towards her, which improves their relationship.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 9
programme.desc: Fuxi and Dong Hai run into a robber. Dong Hai gets stabbed and suddenly regains his sense of taste. However, he feels that it is Fuxi who has helped him regain his senses. He vows to start anew and cook good dishes again. In a drunken stupor, Er Hu tells Dong Hai he wants to give Wan Fu Lou and Fuxi to him, leaving Dong Hai feeling very awkward.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 10
programme.desc: Dafeng tells Fuxi that it was Jess who created trouble between them. Fuxi explains that she knew this all along. That year, in her sadness, she went drinking and ended up in a one-night stand with Dan Yi. Realising that she was pregnant, Fuxi decided to call off the wedding. Dafeng is upset that a small misunderstanding caused their break-up. Fuxi tells him to treasure Pin Hong.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Perched Forest
programme.desc: Commissioner Macéna shows Captain Kandinsky a letter from a ten-year-old boy who claims that a monster in his village forest is behind a string of disappearances. Kandinsky begins the investigation when the boy threatens to confront the culprit himself.

programme.title: Sarah Kohr: Ghosts Of The Past
programme.desc: Ex-gang leader Degen escapes prison after 19 years, putting inspector Sarah Kohr and prosecutor Anton Mehringer in danger. Unable to count on the authorities without risking their secrets, they must confront their pasts when Degen kidnaps Anton's son.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Haunted by a colleague's suicide and grappling with guilt, Helen Dorn confronts the unspoken accusations of her fellow officers. At the same time, she is assigned to solve a medical student's murder, where she soon uncovers their double life.

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: When photographer Marlene's son Jason faces a life-altering skateboarding accident, their journey to healing takes unexpected turns. As they travel from Berlin to Switzerland, Jason slowly convinces his mother that life takes detours.

programme.title: Ghost Mountaineer

programme.title: Djam
programme.desc: Djam, a bold young Greek woman, travels to Istanbul to look for an engine part for her uncle’s boat. She meets a stranded and penniless Avril, who is a volunteer for Syrian refugees. Together, they embark on a lively, music-filled journey to Mytilene.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). programme.title: Gerimis Di Hati Sr 1 - EP 7
programme.desc: As the sole breadwinner with a monthly income of less than 1500, Nizam struggles to care for his wife, Alifah, and two children. Alifah wishes to have her father and handicapped brother stay with her, and Nizam feels immense pressure to earn more money so that the family can upgrade to a bigger apartment. But Nizam was tricked by his sister Nana to take a loan on her behalf and he is forced to sell his current apartment to pay for the loan.

programme.title: Rajuk Karina - EP 1
programme.desc: Mizan and Karina have a close relationship as cousins, but their relationship starts to drift apart after a family meeting.

programme.title: Misteri Minda - EP 8

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places - EP 17
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.
